ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance statistic */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season during which the statistic was recorded */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was recorded */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game during which the statistic was recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the statistic */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the statistic was recorded */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player was on the court */,
  "home_or_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was a home or away game */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team when the statistic was recorded */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent when the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_statistics_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_statistics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the statistic */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., offensive, defensive, miscellaneous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opponent team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the opponent team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the opponent team's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the opponent team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Home Win, Away Win, Draw) */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Point Guard, Center) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "contract_expiration" INTEGER /* Year the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistic */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance statistic being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES performance_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
